title: The Giants Clash Again
description: On pages 7–10, the giants clash again as the battle between Dorry and Brogy is poisoned by interference, pushing Luffy and Usopp toward a furious confrontation.
scene: The Giants Clash Again. The battle between Dorry and Brogy is poisoned by interference, pushing Luffy and Usopp toward a furious confrontation. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Seryaaaa!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Ohhh!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: NGAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: H-H-He took it right on the helmet!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: If he received that blow just a few centi- metres off, it'd have meant instant death!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: We have been

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: W-what a fight... All of their attacks are aiming for each other's most vital points to kill with one blow!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And they've been fighting like this for over 100 years...!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: But it's good for us... this is our chance to escape!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Let's go, usop!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: wow...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: usop??

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: The reason?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I forgot that long ago! Gabababa!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Even without any reason, they fight like this...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: God, what a nuisance they are...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: You fool! This is what a man's fight is!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Let's say that there's a metaphorical flag raised in their hearts...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: And those flags are more important than their very lives!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: They don't want their flags to be broken no matter what...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: And so, to protect that flag, they continue this fight for over 100 years!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Can't you see!? This is a real battle of pride,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Between two Warriors!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Well, I'm not interested in any of that stuff so I'm going to take off!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'm going to stay here a bit longer and watch!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: This is it!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This is what I meant by a brave warrior of the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I want to become a proud warrior just like them!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Hmph...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: So you want to be a giant, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Did you even listen to anything I just said!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: If there's an entire village full of warriors like them,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'd sure like to visit it one day...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Guh!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the giants clash again. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
